blurb: Cohere is an enterprise-focused frontier AI company (LLMs, retrieval, agents) with a London presence, positioning around 'sovereign' and secure enterprise AI deployment.

publications.title: Introducing Command A+: Making sovereign agentic capabilities available to all
publications.summary: Launch of Command A+, framed around 'sovereign agentic capabilities' — relevant to the AI-sovereignty policy debate (national control over models/data) that Cohere positions itself within.

publications.title: Why Cultural Awareness is Essential for Global AI
publications.summary: Cohere argument on how users worldwide are affected by AI's cultural gaps — a values/representation angle adjacent to global AI governance. Listing showed no explicit date for this item; date left null.

notes: Harvested 2026-06-27 via OpenClaw headless browser (cohere.com/blog passed cleanly; was untested by web_fetch this morning). Cohere's blog is mostly product/model launches (low policy signal) — I selected only the two items with a sovereignty/governance angle to keep signal high per SOUL ('skim everything, summarise what matters'). Dates taken from the date string shown inline on the blog listing (e.g. 'MAY 20, 2026'); the cultural-awareness post had no inline date so date=null. Omitted pure product launches (North Mini Code, Transcribe, Model Vault, Rerank 4, serving-fairness) as not policy-relevant.
